description: Style NoteLet your little man enjoy comfort and style with this t-shirt from the jungle book collection. This tee is sure to become a favourite in no time and is a must buy. Team it with shorts and comfy footwear for that uber cool and comfy look.Product DetailsWhite t-shirt that has a round neck, short sleeves with snipped edges, graphic and rubber print on the front, stitch detailing and snipped edges at the hemMaterial and Care100% CottonHand wash warm with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededLine dryCool iron; do not iron on decorationsDo not dry clean
